REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS SE-SF, LLC AND SRIDHAR EQUITIES' MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF COMPLAINT IS DENIED. COMPLAINT SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES FACTS GIVING RISE TO PUNITIVE DAMAGES, I.E. CONSCIOUS DISREGARD FOR PLAINTIFF'S RIGHTS AND SAFETY AND FAILURE TO REMEDIATE RAW SEWAGE LEAK OVER EXTENDED PERIOD. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-22-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Patrick Torsey, Esq. (818-638-8541) of Baker & Associates for Defendant/Moving party SE-SF, LLC and SRIDHAR EQUITIES.
No other Appearance.

Defendant informs the Court he did not notice opposing side of his appearance to contest in Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS SE-SF, LLC and SRIDHAR EQUITIES' Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint is DENIED. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts giving rise to punitive damages, i.e. conscious disregard for plaintiff's rights and safety and failure to remediate raw sewage leak over extended period. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: A. James Robertson, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-24-2015 Continued To Jul-22-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SE-SF and SRIDHAR EQUITIES' Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint is continued to July 22, 2015 for parties to comply with SFLR 2.6B and C. All courtesy copies must be delivered to department 501 no later than July 6, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported (D501)
